name: Trade Desk, Inc.
summary: Trade Desk, Inc. (TTD) operates a self-service cloud-based platform that enables buyers of digital advertising to plan, manage, optimize, and measure data-driven digital advertising campaigns across various channels including display, video, audio, native, and social, on a wide range of devices such as computers, mobile devices, and connected TVs.

products.name: Trade Desk Platform
products.description: Self-service cloud-based demand-side platform enabling buyers to manage and optimize data-driven digital advertising campaigns across multiple channels and devices.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
